lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਰਤ ਲੋਕ ਪਇਆਲ ਸਮੀਪਤ ਅਸਥਿਰ ਥਾਨੁ ਜਿਸੁ ਹੈ ਅਭਗਾ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: mirat lok peaal sameepat asathir thaan jis hai abhagaa |12|
lines.english: He is near this world and the nether regions of the underworld; His Place is permanent, ever-stable and imperishable. ||12||
The Purifier of sinners, the Destroyer of pain and fear.
The Eliminator of egotism, the Eradicator of coming and going.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤੀ ਤੋਖਿਤ ਦੀਨ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲਾ ਗੁਣੇ ਨ ਕਿਤ ਹੀ ਹੈ ਭਿਗਾ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: bhagatee tokhit deen kripaalaa gune na kit hee hai bhigaa |13|
lines.english: He is pleased with devotional worship, and merciful to the meek; He cannot be appeased by any other qualities. ||13||
He is the Embodiment of Light; through Him, the whole world blossoms forth.
The Formless Lord is undeceivable and unchanging.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਮਿਲੈ ਜਿਸੁ ਆਪਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ਆਪਹੁ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਪਾਵੈਗਾ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: so milai jis aap milaae aapahu koe na paavaigaa |14|
lines.english: He alone unites with Him, whom He unites with Himself. No one can attain the Lord by himself. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਉਪਾਵਹਿ ਆਪਿ ਖਪਾਵਹਿ ਤੁਧੁ ਲੇਪੁ ਨਹੀ ਇਕੁ ਤਿਲੁ ਰੰਗਾ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: aap upaaveh aap khapaaveh tudh lep nahee ik til rangaa |15|
lines.english: You Yourself create, and You Yourself destroy. Not even a particle of filth attaches to You. ||15||
He Himself is the milk-maid, and He Himself is Krishna.
He Himself grazes the cows in the forest.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਸ ਫਨੀ ਸੇਖ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਜਾਨੈ ॥
lines.translit: sehas fanee sekh ant na jaanai |
lines.english: Even the thousand-headed serpent does not know Your limit.
Which of Your Glorious Virtues can I chant with my one tongue?
I have grasped the Support, and entered the Sanctuary of the Lord, the Father of the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਵਤਨ ਨਾਮ ਜਪੈ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਇਕੁ ਗੁਣੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਹਿ ਸੰਗਾ ॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: navatan naam japai din raatee ik gun naahee prabh keh sangaa |16|
lines.english: One may chant new names for You day and night, but even so, O God, no one can describe even one of Your Glorious Virtues. ||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਹੁ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ਇਛਾ ਕਰਿ ਰਾਖਹੁ ਸਾਧ ਸੰਤਨ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਸੰਗਾ ॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: hohu kripaal ichhaa kar raakhahu saadh santan kai sang sangaa |17|
lines.english: Please be merciful, Lord, and save me, if it is Your Will; please lead me to join with the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy. ||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਭਇਆਨਕ ਜਮਦੂਤ ਦੁਤਰ ਹੈ ਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bhai bheaanak jamadoot dutar hai maaeaa |
lines.english: The Messenger of Death is terrifying and horrendous, and sea of Maya is impassable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਸਤਕਿ ਲਾਇ ਪਰਮ ਪਦੁ ਪਾਵਉ ਜਿਸੁ ਪ੍ਰਾਪਤਿ ਸੋ ਪਾਵੈਗਾ ॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: masatak laae param pad paavau jis praapat so paavaigaa |18|
lines.english: Applying it to my forehead, I obtain the supreme status; he alone obtains it, unto whom You give it. ||18||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕੁ ਮਾਗਉ ਦਾਨੁ ਗੋਬਿਦ ਸੰਤ ਰੇਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: eik maagau daan gobid sant renaa |
lines.english: I beg for this one gift, for the dust of the feet of the Saints, O Lord of the Universe.
All that is seen is an illusion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਸਾਧੂ ਚਰਣ ਲੈ ਰਿਦੈ ਪਰਾਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: tin saadhoo charan lai ridai paraate |
lines.english: grasp the feet of the Holy, and weave them into their hearts.
Those, unto whom the Lord, the Giver of peace, grants His Mercy,
With my tongue I chant the Names given to You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਨਾਮ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਤਿਨ ਪਾਇਆ ਅਨਹਦ ਸਬਦ ਮਨਿ ਵਾਜੰਗਾ ॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: sagal naam nidhaan tin paaeaa anahad sabad man vaajangaa |19|
lines.english: They obtain all the wealth of the Naam, the Name of the Lord; the unstruck sound current of the Shabad vibrates and resounds within their minds. ||19||
'Sat Naam' is Your perfect, primal Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਭਗਤ ਪਏ ਸਰਣਾਈ ਦੇਹੁ ਦਰਸੁ ਮਨਿ ਰੰਗੁ ਲਗਾ ॥੨੦॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak bhagat pe saranaaee dehu daras man rang lagaa |20|
lines.english: Says Nanak, Your devotees have entered Your Sanctuary. Please bestow the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan; their minds are filled with love for You. ||20||
You alone know Your state and extent.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਆਪੇ ਕਥਹਿ ਤੈ ਆਪਿ ਵਖਾਣਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: too aape katheh tai aap vakhaaneh |
lines.english: You Yourself speak, and You Yourself describe it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਸੁ ਦਾਸਨ ਕੋ ਕਰੀਅਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਭਾਵੈ ਦਾਸਾ ਰਾਖੁ ਸੰਗਾ ॥੨੧॥੨॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: naanak daas daasan ko kareeahu har bhaavai daasaa raakh sangaa |21|2|11|
lines.english: Please make Nanak the slave of Your slaves, O Lord; as it pleases Your Will, please keep him with Your slaves. ||21||2||11||
O slave of the inaccessible Lord God Allah,
Maaroo, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਇ ਪੈ ਖਾਕ ਫਕੀਰ ਮੁਸਾਫਰੁ ਇਹੁ ਦਰਵੇਸੁ ਕਬੂਲੁ ਦਰਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: hoe pai khaak fakeer musaafar ihu daraves kabool daraa |1|
lines.english: Become the dust of the feet of the humble fakeers, and consider yourself a traveller on this journey. O saintly dervish, you shall be approved in the Court of the Lord. ||1||
forsake thoughts of worldly entanglements.
Let Truth be your prayer, and faith your prayer-mat.
Subdue your desires, and overcome your hopes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਹ ਮਸੀਤਿ ਮਨੁ ਮਉਲਾਣਾ ਕਲਮ ਖੁਦਾਈ ਪਾਕੁ ਖਰਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: deh maseet man maulaanaa kalam khudaaee paak kharaa |2|
lines.english: Let your body be the mosque, and your mind the priest. Let true purity be God's Word for you. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰਫਤਿ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਰਹੁ ਅਬਦਾਲਾ ਮਿਲਹੁ ਹਕੀਕਤਿ ਜਿਤੁ ਫਿਰਿ ਨ ਮਰਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: maarafat man maarahu abadaalaa milahu hakeekat jit fir na maraa |3|
lines.english: Let control of the mind be your spiritual wisdom, O holy man; meeting with God, you shall never die again. ||3||
Let your spiritual cleansing be to renounce the world and seek God.
Let your practice be to live the spiritual life.
restrain the ten sensory organs from straying into evil.
Practice within your heart the teachings of the Koran and the Bible;
Let compassion be your Mecca, and the dust of the feet of the holy your fast.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਚ ਮਰਦ ਸਿਦਕਿ ਲੇ ਬਾਧਹੁ ਖੈਰਿ ਸਬੂਰੀ ਕਬੂਲ ਪਰਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: panch marad sidak le baadhahu khair sabooree kabool paraa |4|
lines.english: Tie up the five demons of desire with faith, charity and contentment, and you shall be acceptable. ||4||
Let Paradise be your practice of the Prophet's Word.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੂਰ ਨੂਰ ਮੁਸਕੁ ਖੁਦਾਇਆ ਬੰਦਗੀ ਅਲਹ ਆਲਾ ਹੁਜਰਾ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: hoor noor musak khudaaeaa bandagee alah aalaa hujaraa |5|
lines.english: God is the beauty, the light and the fragrance. Meditation on Allah is the secluded meditation chamber. ||5||
